name: Peanut Butter Candy Cake
recipeIngredient: Peanut butter cups (5 pieces, .6 ounce size)
recipeInstructions:
- Use 5 milk chocolate-covered peanut butter cups.
- Combine water and oats; cool to room temperature. Set aside.
- Cream together butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla. Beat in eggs.
- Blend in the oatmeal mixture.
- Mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt; add to creamed mixture.
- Beat on medium speed for 1 minute.
- Pour batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
- Chop peanut butter cups and sprinkle on top of the batter. Do not stir.
- Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until cake tests done.
Frosting:
- Melt butter in a small saucepan.
- Add chocolate and stir constantly over very low heat until melted.
- Pour into a small bowl.
- Add remaining ingredients and beat until well blended.
- Chill to spreading consistency, about 15 minutes.
- Frost the cake.
